mandatory_roots.definition: signed positive directional expansion with action semantics distinct from generic trend or residual bull context
mandatory_roots.reuse_policy: legacy evidence is provenance only until signed positive expansion labels or unchanged chronological calibration pass
mandatory_roots.acceptance_requirement: root-specific qualifying rule, chronological calibration/test Wilson95 >= 0.95, cross-market/timeframe validation, full-cycle/full-universe accounting

mandatory_roots.definition: signed negative directional expansion distinct from ordinary crisis stress or bullish expansion
mandatory_roots.reuse_policy: legacy evidence is provenance only; crisis/stress cannot substitute for downside expansion
mandatory_roots.acceptance_requirement: separate downside expansion labels/rules, chronological calibration/test Wilson95 >= 0.95, cross-market/timeframe validation

mandatory_roots.definition: range, compression, sideways persistence, and false-break/mean-reversion feasibility as a primary action state
mandatory_roots.reuse_policy: legacy range evidence can be child/provenance only until V5 root rerun passes
mandatory_roots.acceptance_requirement: range-specific qualifying condition plus chronological calibration/test and full provider/timeframe accounting

mandatory_roots.definition: tail-loss, volatility dislocation, liquidity cliff, or crash/stress state distinct from ordinary bear expansion
mandatory_roots.reuse_policy: prior Crisis/ExtremeStress packets are provenance only until V5 crisis-stress rerun passes
mandatory_roots.acceptance_requirement: tail/liquidity-stress source labels or calibrated stress rules with cross-context validation

mandatory_roots.definition: spoofing, layering, wash trading, pump/dump, quote stuffing, stop-run, liquidity raid, or comparable execution-trust manipulation
mandatory_roots.reuse_policy: OHLCV/session/liquidity proxies are inputs only; accepted evidence requires direct timestamped positive/negative labels
mandatory_roots.acceptance_requirement: direct event/order-flow/order-lifecycle/L2/L3/MBO/social/on-chain labels with positives and negatives; chronological calibration/test Wilson95 >= 0.95 and broad coverage

mandatory_roots.definition: accumulation, distribution, reversal, or boundary transition phase that gates trading differently from expansion or consolidation
mandatory_roots.reuse_policy: legacy reversal evidence is child/provenance only until transition-specific validation passes
mandatory_roots.acceptance_requirement: transition hazard, break recency, duration viability, and post-boundary validation with unchanged 95% gate

optional_overlays_until_proven.definition: risk-on/risk-off, policy/liquidity cycle, or cross-asset rotation that may dominate single-instrument behavior
optional_overlays_until_proven.promotion_requirement: prove separability, support, downstream action difference, and root-specific 95% calibration before becoming mandatory

residual.policy: fail closed; do not force weak root labels

hard_rejections: do not promote subtype/signature packets by wording
do not accept HMM/GMM/cluster IDs without external labels or unchanged chronological calibration
do not accept OHLCV/session/liquidity proxies as ManipulationLiquidityEngineering
do not count document indexes, search surfaces, or methodology papers as source-label panels

providers_or_sources: IBKR if operator runtime is available
next_calibration_matrix.current_blocker: source labels/direct positive-negative rows are still insufficient for a full V5 calibration matrix

next_action: Run a V5 attachability/calibration preflight that maps existing source-backed packets and missing slots to the six mandatory V5 roots without relaxing thresholds.
